case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $875.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO STRIKE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE VIRGILIO POLL VELIZ

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF VIRGILIO VELIZ IS GRANTED. THE CLAIMANT IS GRANTED LEAVE TO VERIFY THE CLAIM IF THE CLAIMANT APPEARS AT THE HEARING. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Raymond Fong of Office of The District Attorney telephone number 415-845-5807 for The People of The State of California.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE the claim of Virgilio Veliz is granted. The claimant is granted leave to verify the claim if the claimant appears at the hearing. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
